goal: Prepare the exported internal AI workspace to use the project AM harness and at least one runnable am-bridge execution path, with optional global harness and tool registration when the platform allows it.

successCriteria: A global harness command or equivalent prompt exists when the platform allows it.
The command inspects workspace harness files.
The command reports workflow and tool readiness.
The PM/PL role split is preserved.
The model knows to use review.json as the correction layer.
The AM page modernization workflow is reusable.
Stage 1 produces a detailed integrated legacy analysis report.
Stage 2 produces a Vue page config JSON.
At least one direct execution path is available without admin-only setup.
The selected runtime path can resolve the page path.
The selected runtime path returns or emits the expected stage artifacts.
Stage tool output is JSON when tool registration is enabled.
The runner can resolve the page path.
Artifact paths are returned in the tool output.

preferredChecks: runner help or direct callable check
stage1 on the bundled sample page or another configured known page
stage2 on a known page only when stage1 succeeded
